chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 36 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 20.09.2023. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 1426/2023. FOR HEARING OF M.A. 164/2023. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE ------- Syed Tanveer Ashraf Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri A.A.G. Sindh. ---- At the request of the counsel the allotment letter of 31.07.2022 be read as allotment letter dated 31.07.2002. Order accordingly. This petition was filed for the enforcement of the order of the Provincial Ombudsman Sindh dated 13.05.2013, and the petitioner also seeks physical possession of a land measuring 14-00 acres in Phase-1 & 2 or in Phase-3 of SITE Nooriabad Sindh. Petitioner claimed to be a proprietor of M/s A. Essak & Sons and seeks the aforesaid directions. We are not satisfied with the stance of the petitioner that the petitioner could be handed over piece of land measuring 14-00 acres in pursuance of a promise made by Respondent and/or in pursuance of any understanding reached. Even the order of the Provincial Ombudsman Sindh cannot be executed by a Division Bench of this Court and that too of 13.05.2013. Nonetheless this Court cannot become an executing court of the Provincial Ombudsman Sindh. In case the petitioner is deprived of any right in relation to the land in question, they may pursue their remedy before a forum including but not limited to Civil Court for the redressal of their grievances. The petition stands dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
